message:
fix(cli): validate orphaned modifier flags for 9 additional robot subcommands

Extend validate_orphaned_modifier_flags to catch usage of modifier flags
(--orphans-min-score, --file-beads-limit, --hotspots-limit, relation/
related/network/forecast/capacity modifiers) without their required parent
subcommand flag. Each returns a descriptive error with exit code 2.

New integration tests for all 9 modifier-without-parent combinations.
Clean up stale .beads/recovery snapshots from 2026-03-27.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
